core_interpretation: Nutrition/intake data are behavioral-nutritional context layers; intake must be connected to biomarkers, body mass, function, hydration markers and timing before mechanistic inference.
guardrails: Do not infer nutrient deficiency from intake alone.
Do not infer hydration status from fluid intake alone.
Do not infer low energy availability from one low-calorie day.
Do not infer dietary causality for mood/fatigue without timing and biomarkers.
Do not compare diet logs without underreporting and protocol context.
research_gaps: Lack of robust studies on standalone nutritional countermeasures for spaceflight deconditioning.
Limited long-term RCTs on circadian-aligned eating and metabolic health.
Insufficient validation of dietary assessment tools across diverse populations/settings.
Few studies integrating food system constraints/appetite with physiological outcomes in extreme environments.
